name: Userbrain
description: Unmoderated user testing platform with 170k+ testers delivering recorded session videos of real users completing tasks on your product.

seo.title: Userbrain — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Userbrain: Unmoderated user testing platform with 170k+ testers delivering recorded session videos of real users completing tasks on your product.

when_to_use: Unmoderated user testing with 170k+ tester panel
Recorded video sessions of real users on your product
Rapid prototype testing before development investment

pros: Large panel of 170k testers for quick recruitment
Videos of real users doing tasks, not just analytics
Unmoderated format scales without scheduling overhead
cons: Not production session replay despite recording users
Panel quality varies by language and niche
Unmoderated format can miss deep why-questions
review.verdict: Fast unmoderated user testing with a big panel, but don't confuse it with live production replay tooling.
review.best_for: UX teams needing quick task-based feedback from real testers.
review.not_for: Teams looking for production session replay on real customers.
